Who We Are

Crafting Metal With Purpose

Founded in 2008, Thalia Metal Works has grown from a local fabrication shop into a full-scale industrial metal solutions provider. We serve construction, manufacturing, and infrastructure sectors across the region.

Our team of certified welders, engineers, and fabricators combine decades of hands-on experience with modern CNC and laser-cutting technology — producing components that meet the tightest tolerances.

⚙
CNC Precision Cutting
🔥
Certified Welding
📐
CAD Engineering
🛡
ISO 9001 Quality
What We Do

Our Services

From concept to completion, TMW handles every phase of metal fabrication and installation with uncompromising precision and safety standards.

01
⚙
Structural Fabrication

Custom beams, columns, trusses, and frames built to structural engineering specifications for industrial and commercial builds.

02
🔧
Industrial Welding

MIG, TIG, and arc welding for heavy-duty applications. Certified welders on every project, on-site or in-shop.

03
✂
Laser & Plasma Cutting

High-precision CNC laser and plasma cutting for complex profiles, brackets, and custom components at scale.

04
🏗
Steel Erection

Full structural steel erection services — from anchor bolts to final connections — with certified lift planning and rigging.

05
🎨
Surface Finishing

Powder coating, hot-dip galvanizing, and industrial painting to protect and beautify every finished piece.

06
📐
Design & Engineering

In-house CAD/CAM design and engineering support — from early concept sketches to production-ready shop drawings.

Our Edge

Why Choose TMW

🏆
16+ Years Experience

Deep industry knowledge honed over hundreds of complex projects across construction, oil & gas, and manufacturing.

⏱
On-Time Delivery

Rigorous project scheduling and workflow management keeps your timeline on track, every time.

🔬
Precision First

Tolerances measured in fractions of a millimeter. Our QC team inspects every weld, cut, and finish.

🛡
Safety Certified

ISO 9001 certified with a zero-incident safety culture. Full PPE compliance and OSHA-trained workforce.
